item.description:
• What's new
    • System Optimization — Memory Analyzer and System Status combined into one hub for health, memory, and AI recommendations
    • Sidebar score badges — Disk shows HD (free space) and System Optimization shows Health (score) and Mem (percent) with color thresholds
  • Improvements
    • Duplicate groups load preview paths only; full member lists load when you preview cleanup
    • Scan index writes stream in batches and release SQLite cache after heavy work
    • AI storage analysis caps in-memory file samples at 25,000 instead of 500,000
    • Memory Analyzer retains fewer background samples and runs periodic AI every 10 minutes
    • Apple Intelligence memory insights use formatted markdown with clearer paragraph spacing
  • Fixes
    • Reduced idle RAM after scans by clearing cached category files and duplicate reloads mid-scan

• What's new
    • Action buttons on Optimization Analysis — perform Free Memory, Quit, Restart, or Focus App directly from AI insights
    • Periodic Apple Intelligence re-analysis every 5 minutes based on current memory usage and computing habits
    • Memory Analyzer enabled by default — background sampling starts when DiskWise launches
    • Insight notifications — alerts when Apple Intelligence finds a new recommendation, with a one-tap Perform Action button
    • Notification permission prompt on first launch when memory notifications are enabled
  • Improvements
    • Apple Intelligence memory prompts now include a Better computing habits section with practical Mac usage tips
    • Suggested Actions and Optimization Analysis share the same actionable recommendation rows

• What's new
    • Memory Analyzer — samples memory every 20–30 seconds, tracks usual RAM consumers, and surfaces optimization actions
    • Apple Intelligence memory insights — AI-powered analysis of how to run apps more efficiently, with rule-based fallback
    • Suggested actions — free inactive memory, quit or restart heavy apps, and focus browsers to trim tabs
    • Menu-first navigation — Disk, Memory Analyzer, System Status, Maintenance, and Duplicates live in the sidebar
    • Drive picker in the top toolbar — select internal and external volumes for disk analysis from the menu bar area
  • Improvements
    • Navigation layout pivoted: feature menus moved from the top toolbar to the sidebar; volume list moved to the top toolbar
